title: lygodium boivinii
intro: Lygodium boivinii, also known as the climbing fern, is a species of fern that is native to New Caledonia and is widely cultivated for its medicinal properties. It is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lygodium boivinii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
